title: Ubiquiti UA-Card-W-100 - UniFi Access Card (100pcs), white
description: The UniFi Access Card is a highly secure NFC chip card (13.56 MHz) designed for users and visitors access within the UniFi Access system . The card is multi-layer encrypted , effectively preventing unauthorized duplication UA-G2-Pro UA-G2 UA-G3-Pro UA-G3 UA-G3-Flex UA-Reader Lite UA-Retrofit-Reader UA-Ultra UA-Intercom 100 ks cards white color
